creator: pyunyh@gmail.com
text:
On Sat, Mar 12, 2011 at 02:21:00AM +0000, yongari@freebsd.org wrote:
> Synopsis: [bge] bge driver is seen but does not respond to networking requests
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: yongari
> State-Changed-When: Sat Mar 12 02:20:16 UTC 2011
> State-Changed-Why: 
> How about using SYNCDHCP instead of DHCP for bge(4) in rc.conf?
> ifconfig_bge0="SYNCDHCP"
> Does it make any difference?
> 
> If not, would you show me the output of "pciconf -lcbv" output?
> 

Forgot one more thing. Since you don't seem to see interrupts it
could be related with MSI. Try add the following line to
/boot/loader.conf and reboot and let me know it makes any
difference.

hw.pci.enable_msi="0"
